# Project "done" = all promised features working on the emulator, FCM-push-to-device exempt

The class submission deadline is 2026-06-05 (deliver to professor) with the demo window closing 2026-06-04 ??? a 14-day project window starting 2026-05-22. We committed to **full feature parity with the promised behaviour in `docs/09-page-flow-design.md` and `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-19-drone-relief-design.md`**, including the simulation polish that lower-scope options would have cut (failure dice, weather effects on flight, admin restock/maintenance flows). The one explicit carve-out is **FCM push notifications to a real device**: the Firebase emulator does not deliver push notifications, so server-side FCM fan-out still runs and is verified by log inspection, but the user-visible notification surface in the demo is the in-app inbox (`P-U-08`), not OS-level push.

## Consequences

- Estimated remaining work is ~37-40 person-days against 60 person-days of remaining capacity (12 days ?? 5 devs) ??? buffer is thin.
- "Demo works" means seeded emulator data + happy path + main error states across all 16 prototype screens, not a production Firebase deploy.
- Any feature that depends on FCM push *appearing on a device* must have an inbox-based fallback for the demo.
- Scaling down is allowed only via explicit ADR amendment, not silently per-page.

1	# DroneAid ??? Full Page & Flow Design
2	
3	- **Date:** 2026-05-19
4	- **Owners:** All (this is the team-shared source of truth for screens + flows)
5	- **Audience:** human reviewers AND Claude Code (must read end-to-end before writing UI code)
6	- **Companion docs:** `01-concepts.md` (functional list), `07-software-architecture.md` (technical), `08-implementation-diagram.md` (sequences + state machines), and the full spec under `superpowers/specs/`.
7	
8	> **Read order for implementers:** ??1 conventions ??? ??2 components ??? ??3 navigation ??? ??4 seed data ??? ??5 user pages ??? ??6 admin pages ??? ??7 flows ??? ??8 errors ??? ??9 validation. The page sections cite component IDs and flow IDs; do not skip ??1?????3.
9	
10	---
11	
12	## 1. Conventions
13	
14	### 1.1 Identifier system
15	
16	| Prefix | Meaning |
17	|---|---|
18	| `P-U-NN` | User-side page |
19	| `P-A-NN` | Admin-side page |
20	| `C-NN` | Reusable component |
21	| `F-NN` | Flow (cross-page interaction) |
22	| `E-NN` | Error / edge case |
23	| `V-NN` | Validation rule |
24	
25	Every screen, component, flow, and validation rule has a stable ID. Cross-reference by ID, not by name.
26	
27	### 1.2 Visual design tokens
28	
29	#### Theme
30	
31	- **Base:** Material 3, generated from seed color `#006A6A` (teal). Both light and dark variants generated automatically by `ColorScheme.fromSeed()`.
32	- **Brightness modes:** `system` (default), `light`, `dark`. User toggles in Settings (P-U-09).
33	- **Typography:** Material 3 typography. Heading: `headlineSmall` (24/32). Body: `bodyLarge` (16/24). Label: `labelLarge` (14/20). System font (Roboto / SF).
34	
35	#### Spacing scale
36	
37	| Token | px |
38	|---|---|
39	| `space-xs` | 4 |
40	| `space-sm` | 8 |
41	| `space-md` | 16 |
42	| `space-lg` | 24 |
43	| `space-xl` | 32 |
44	| `space-2xl` | 48 |
45	
46	Use multiples of 4. Default page padding: `space-md` (16) horizontally, `space-md` vertically.
47	
48	#### Shapes
49	
50	- Cards: `RoundedRectangleBorder(radius: 12)`.
51	- Buttons: M3 default (`FilledButton`, `OutlinedButton`, `TextButton`).
52	- Map markers: 32??32 circular with 2px white border.
53	
54	#### Motion
55	
56	- Page transitions: M3 shared-axis (forward/back).
57	- Status updates: `AnimatedSwitcher` 200 ms fade.
58	- Drone marker movement: `AnimationController` with 60 fps tick, linear easing.
59	
60	### 1.3 Copy style
61	
62	- All UI strings in **English only** for v1.
63	- Tone: clear, calm, factual. No exclamation marks except in errors.
64	- Date format: `MMM d, h:mm a` (e.g. `Jun 4, 7:42 PM`).
65	- Distance: kilometers with one decimal (e.g. `4.2 km`).
66	- ETA: relative (`in 12 min`) plus absolute (`7:42 PM`).
67	- All copy lives in `app/lib/l10n/app_en.arb`; the doc uses inline copy for readability but every string is keyed.
68	
69	### 1.4 Loading / empty / error pattern
70	
71	Every screen that fetches data has four states. Each page section below specifies the exact copy for each state.
72	
73	| State | Treatment |
74	|---|---|
75	| `loading` | Centered `CircularProgressIndicator`, no skeleton. |
76	| `empty` | Centered illustration (placeholder), heading, supportive line, optional action button. |
77	| `error` | Centered error icon, heading "Something went wrong", body with localized error, "Retry" button. |
78	| `data` | Real content. |
79	
80	### 1.5 Navigation rules
81	
82	- `go_router` declarative routes. See ??3 for the full map.
83	- Auth gate redirects unauthenticated users to `/login`.
84	- Role gate redirects user role to user shell, admin role to admin shell.
85	- Back button on every non-root page; root pages (bottom-nav destinations) have no back button.
86	- Deep links from notifications use the `?from=notification` query param so screens know to show "Back to Notifications" instead of system back.
87	
88	---
89	
90	## 2. Component library (C-NN)
91	
92	Reusable widgets owned by Belle (`app/lib/widgets/`). Page specs reference these by ID.
93	
94	| ID | Component | Purpose | Key props |
95	|---|---|---|---|
96	| **C-01** | `AppScaffold` | Standard page chrome (AppBar, body, optional bottom-nav) | `title`, `actions`, `body`, `showBottomNav` |
97	| **C-02** | `StatusChip` | Color-coded status pill | `status: RequestStatus \| FlightStatus \| DroneStatus` |
98	| **C-03** | `BatteryBar` | Horizontal battery gauge | `percent: 0..100`, `lowThreshold: int = 15` |
99	| **C-04** | `DroneMap` | flutter_map wrapper with drone marker + path | `origin`, `destination`, `flightPlan`, `mode: 'single'\|'fleet'` |
100	| **C-05** | `ItemPickerSheet` | Bottom-sheet to add a catalog item + qty | `items: List<CatalogItem>`, `onAdd: (id, qty) -> void` |
101	| **C-06** | `RequestCard` | Compact card showing one request | `request`, `onTap`, `showUser: bool` |
102	| **C-07** | `DroneCard` | Compact card showing one drone | `drone`, `onTap` |
103	| **C-08** | `NotificationListTile` | Inbox row | `notification`, `onTap` |
104	| **C-09** | `EmptyState` | Empty-state illustration + copy + CTA | `icon`, `title`, `body`, `actionLabel?`, `onAction?` |
105	| **C-10** | `ErrorState` | Error illustration + copy + retry | `error`, `onRetry` |
106	| **C-11** | `WeightBar` | Live weight vs drone-max progress bar | `currentKg`, `maxKg = 6.0` |
107	| **C-12** | `ConfirmDialog` | Standard destructive-action dialog | `title`, `body`, `confirmLabel`, `dangerous: bool` |
108	| **C-13** | `MapPinPicker` | Fullscreen map to drop / drag a pin | `initial?: LatLng`, `onPick: (LatLng) -> void` |
109	| **C-14** | `EtaTicker` | Self-updating ETA / battery readout | `flight`, refreshes every 1 s |

1003	#### Drone picker logic (`eligibleDronesProvider`)
1004	
1005	- Filters: `status=idle`, `maxPayloadKg >= totalWeightKg`, base within `15 km` of destination, `batteryPct >= 30` (configurable, warn at 30???50).
1006	- Sort: by distance ascending, then battery descending.
1007	- If list empty: shows EmptyState with copy "No eligible drone right now. Try again in a few minutes or send to another shift." and disables Assign.
1008	
1009	#### Acceptance criteria
1010	
1011	```gherkin
1012	Feature: Manage a request
1013	
1014	  Scenario: Approve and assign
1015	    Given a pending request with total weight 3.0 kg
1016	    When the admin taps Approve
1017	    Then approveRequest is invoked
1018	    And stock for each item is decremented atomically
1019	    And status becomes "approved"
1020	    And the drone picker section reveals 3 eligible drones
1021	
1022	    When the admin selects DRN-001 and taps "Assign DRN-001"
1023	    Then assignDrone({reqId, droneId:"drn-001"}) is invoked
1024	    And a flight document is created with status=enroute
1025	    And drone DRN-001 status becomes "flying"
1026	    And the request status becomes "in_flight"
1027	    And the user receives a push "Drone dispatched"
1028	
1029	  Scenario: Reject with reason
1030	    When the admin taps Reject
1031	    Then a dialog asks for a reason from a preset list:
1032	      | reason                |
1033	      | Out of stock          |
1034	      | Weather too dangerous |
1035	      | Out of service area   |
1036	      | Other                 |
1037	    When the admin selects a reason and confirms
1038	    Then rejectRequest({reqId, reason}) is invoked
1039	    And status becomes "rejected" with the chosen reason
1040	
1041	  Scenario: Stock insufficient at approve
1042	    Given between viewing and approving, another admin approved a competing request that drained stock
1043	    When the admin taps Approve
1044	    Then approveRequest returns error "OUT_OF_STOCK: <itemName>"
1045	    And a snackbar shows the message and the page reloads stock
1046	
1047	  Scenario: No eligible drone
1048	    Given total weight exceeds all available drones' payload (impossible in v1 since max kg = 6)
1049	    Or all drones are flying/maintenance
1050	    Then the picker shows the empty state and Assign is disabled
1051	
1052	  Scenario: Reassign after failure
1053	    Given the request is in status "failed" with a previous flight
1054	    Then a banner reads "Previous attempt failed (weather)."
1055	    And the Reassign button opens the drone picker again
1056	    When the admin assigns a new drone
1057	    Then a new flight is created and request status becomes "in_flight"
1058	```

1310	## 7. Flows (F-NN)
1311	
1312	### F-01 Register
1313	
1314	**Trigger:** user taps "Create account" on P-U-02.
1315	**Preconditions:** all form fields valid (V-01..V-06).
1316	**Steps:**
1317	1. Client calls `FirebaseAuth.createUserWithEmailAndPassword("<id>@drone-aid.local", password)`.
1318	2. `onUserCreated` trigger fires server-side, provisions `users/{uid}`.
1319	3. Client awaits `users/{uid}` doc exists, then reads role.
1320	4. Router redirects to `/user/home` (role=user) or `/admin/requests` (role=admin).
1321	**Postconditions:** authenticated session, `users/{uid}` exists with role + delivered profile fields.
1322	**Errors:** E-05 ID already registered, E-06 weak password, E-07 network failure.
1323	
1324	```gherkin
1325	Feature: Register flow
1326	  Scenario: Happy path
1327	    Given a fresh national ID and valid form
1328	    When the user submits
1329	    Then within 5 s they land on /user/home
1330	  Scenario: ID already exists
1331	    When the user submits an ID that is already taken
1332	    Then they see error E-05 inline
1333	```
1334	
1335	### F-02 Login
1336	
1337	**Trigger:** user taps "Log in" on P-U-01.
1338	**Steps:**
1339	1. `signInWithEmailAndPassword`.
1340	2. Read `users/{uid}.role` to pick shell.
1341	3. Router pushes shell.
1342	**Errors:** E-01 wrong creds, E-02 invalid checksum, E-03 locked, E-04 network.
1343	
1344	### F-03 Logout
1345	
1346	**Trigger:** user taps "Log out" on P-U-09.
1347	**Steps:**
1348	1. Confirm dialog.
1349	2. Delete this device's FCM token from `users/{uid}.fcmTokens`.
1350	3. `FirebaseAuth.signOut()`.
1351	4. Router redirects to `/login`.
1352	
1353	### F-04 Edit profile field
1354	
1355	**Trigger:** user edits a field on P-U-09.
1356	**Steps:**
1357	1. Inline edit input replaces label.
1358	2. On Enter or blur ??? `updateProfile({field, value})`.
1359	3. Success shows "Saved" for 1 s.
1360	**Errors:** E-08 validation, E-04 network.
1361	
1362	### F-05 Set delivery pin
1363	
1364	**Trigger:** user taps Edit on the delivery pin row.
1365	**Steps:**
1366	1. Push `MapPinPicker` (C-13) with current pin as initial.
1367	2. User drags marker; tap "Use this location".
1368	3. Reverse-geocode (optional) ??? label.
1369	4. `updateProfile({deliveryAddress})`.
1370	
1371	### F-06 Add to cart
1372	
1373	**Trigger:** user taps a catalog row on P-U-03.
1374	**Steps:**
1375	1. `ItemPickerSheet` (C-05) opens with item details.
1376	2. User selects quantity (default 1).
1377	3. Tap Add ??? cart provider gains the row.
1378	4. WeightBar recomputes.
1379	**Errors:** E-09 item out of stock (button disabled).
1380	
1381	### F-07 Submit request
1382	
1383	**Trigger:** user taps Submit on P-U-03.
1384	**Preconditions:** cart non-empty, weight ??? 6.0 kg, delivery pin set.
1385	**Steps:**
1386	1. Client builds payload `{items, deliveryAddress, priority, notes}`.
1387	2. Calls `submitRequest` callable.
1388	3. Server validates: each item exists + is active + stock >= qty; total weight ??? maxPayloadKg; user role=user.
1389	4. Server creates `requests/{reqId}` with status=pending, decremented nothing yet.
1390	5. Server FCMs all admins with new-request push.
1391	6. Client clears cart, navigates to /user/queue with snackbar.
1392	**Errors:** E-10 weight exceeded, E-11 stock changed, E-04 network.
1393	
1394	### F-08 Watch queue
1395	
1396	**Trigger:** user navigates to /user/queue.
1397	**Steps:** stream from Firestore, render sections per status group. Live updates on any field change.
1398	
1399	### F-09 Cancel pending request
1400	
1401	**Trigger:** user taps Cancel on a pending row.
1402	**Steps:**
1403	1. ConfirmDialog.
1404	2. `cancelRequest({reqId})`.
1405	3. Server checks status == pending, sets status=cancelled.
1406	**Errors:** E-12 already approved (server rejects with code, snackbar shown).
1407	
1408	### F-10 View tracking
1409	
1410	**Trigger:** user taps Track on queue or notification deep-link.
1411	**Steps:** subscribe to `flights/{flightId}`, compute live position + battery via C-04 + C-14.
1412	**Sub-flows:** F-10a state transition shown live; F-10b abort banner.
1413	
1414	### F-11 Tap notification
1415	
1416	**Trigger:** user taps a row in /user/notifications, OR taps an FCM push.
1417	**Steps:**

# DroneAid ??? Full Page & Flow Design

- **Date:** 2026-05-19
- **Owners:** All (this is the team-shared source of truth for screens + flows)
- **Audience:** human reviewers AND Claude Code (must read end-to-end before writing UI code)
- **Companion docs:** `01-concepts.md` (functional list), `07-software-architecture.md` (technical), `08-implementation-diagram.md` (sequences + state machines), and the full spec under `superpowers/specs/`.

> **Read order for implementers:** ??1 conventions ??? ??2 components ??? ??3 navigation ??? ??4 seed data ??? ??5 user pages ??? ??6 admin pages ??? ??7 flows ??? ??8 errors ??? ??9 validation. The page sections cite component IDs and flow IDs; do not skip ??1?????3.

---

## 1. Conventions

### 1.1 Identifier system

| Prefix | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `P-U-NN` | User-side page |
| `P-A-NN` | Admin-side page |
| `C-NN` | Reusable component |
| `F-NN` | Flow (cross-page interaction) |
| `E-NN` | Error / edge case |
| `V-NN` | Validation rule |

Every screen, component, flow, and validation rule has a stable ID. Cross-reference by ID, not by name.

### 1.2 Visual design tokens

#### Theme

- **Base:** Material 3, generated from seed color `#006A6A` (teal). Both light and dark variants generated automatically by `ColorScheme.fromSeed()`.
- **Brightness modes:** `system` (default), `light`, `dark`. User toggles in Settings (P-U-09).
- **Typography:** Material 3 typography. Heading: `headlineSmall` (24/32). Body: `bodyLarge` (16/24). Label: `labelLarge` (14/20). System font (Roboto / SF).

#### Spacing scale

| Token | px |
|---|---|
| `space-xs` | 4 |
| `space-sm` | 8 |
| `space-md` | 16 |
| `space-lg` | 24 |
| `space-xl` | 32 |
| `space-2xl` | 48 |

Use multiples of 4. Default page padding: `space-md` (16) horizontally, `space-md` vertically.

#### Shapes

- Cards: `RoundedRectangleBorder(radius: 12)`.
- Buttons: M3 default (`FilledButton`, `OutlinedButton`, `TextButton`).
- Map markers: 32??32 circular with 2px white border.

#### Motion

- Page transitions: M3 shared-axis (forward/back).
- Status updates: `AnimatedSwitcher` 200 ms fade.
- Drone marker movement: `AnimationController` with 60 fps tick, linear easing.

### 1.3 Copy style

- All UI strings in **English only** for v1.
- Tone: clear, calm, factual. No exclamation marks except in errors.
- Date format: `MMM d, h:mm a` (e.g. `Jun 4, 7:42 PM`).
- Distance: kilometers with one decimal (e.g. `4.2 km`).
- ETA: relative (`in 12 min`) plus absolute (`7:42 PM`).
- All copy lives in `app/lib/l10n/app_en.arb`; the doc uses inline copy for readability but every string is keyed.

### 1.4 Loading / empty / error pattern

Every screen that fetches data has four states. Each page section below specifies the exact copy for each state.

| State | Treatment |
|---|---|
| `loading` | Centered `CircularProgressIndicator`, no skeleton. |
| `empty` | Centered illustration (placeholder), heading, supportive line, optional action button. |
| `error` | Centered error icon, heading "Something went wrong", body with localized error, "Retry" button. |
| `data` | Real content. |

### 1.5 Navigation rules

- `go_router` declarative routes. See ??3 for the full map.
- Auth gate redirects unauthenticated users to `/login`.
- Role gate redirects user role to user shell, admin role to admin shell.
- Back button on every non-root page; root pages (bottom-nav destinations) have no back button.
- Deep links from notifications use the `?from=notification` query param so screens know to show "Back to Notifications" instead of system back.

---

## 2. Component library (C-NN)

Reusable widgets owned by Belle (`app/lib/widgets/`). Page specs reference these by ID.

| ID | Component | Purpose | Key props |
|---|---|---|---|
| **C-01** | `AppScaffold` | Standard page chrome (AppBar, body, optional bottom-nav) | `title`, `actions`, `body`, `showBottomNav` |
| **C-02** | `StatusChip` | Color-coded status pill | `status: RequestStatus \| FlightStatus \| DroneStatus` |
| **C-03** | `BatteryBar` | Horizontal battery gauge | `percent: 0..100`, `lowThreshold: int = 15` |
| **C-04** | `DroneMap` | flutter_map wrapper with drone marker + path | `origin`, `destination`, `flightPlan`, `mode: 'single'\|'fleet'` |
| **C-05** | `ItemPickerSheet` | Bottom-sheet to add a catalog item + qty | `items: List<CatalogItem>`, `onAdd: (id, qty) -> void` |
| **C-06** | `RequestCard` | Compact card showing one request | `request`, `onTap`, `showUser: bool` |
| **C-07** | `DroneCard` | Compact card showing one drone | `drone`, `onTap` |
| **C-08** | `NotificationListTile` | Inbox row | `notification`, `onTap` |
| **C-09** | `EmptyState` | Empty-state illustration + copy + CTA | `icon`, `title`, `body`, `actionLabel?`, `onAction?` |
| **C-10** | `ErrorState` | Error illustration + copy + retry | `error`, `onRetry` |
| **C-11** | `WeightBar` | Live weight vs drone-max progress bar | `currentKg`, `maxKg = 6.0` |
| **C-12** | `ConfirmDialog` | Standard destructive-action dialog | `title`, `body`, `confirmLabel`, `dangerous: bool` |
| **C-13** | `MapPinPicker` | Fullscreen map to drop / drag a pin | `initial?: LatLng`, `onPick: (LatLng) -> void` |
| **C-14** | `EtaTicker` | Self-updating ETA / battery readout | `flight`, refreshes every 1 s |
| **C-15** | `WeatherBadge` | Tiny pill showing global weather state | `state`, tap ??? admin only opens panel |
| **C-16** | `RolePill` | "USER" / "ADMIN" badge for profile/header | `role` |
| **C-17** | `LoadingButton` | Filled button that shows a spinner while awaiting | `onPressed`, `loading` |
| **C-18** | `NumericKeypadField` | National ID 13-digit input | `controller`, `onComplete` |

---

#### Acceptance criteria (Gherkin)

```gherkin
Feature: Login

  Scenario: Successful user login
    Given a registered user with national ID "[REDACTED:thai-id]" and password "Demo#101"
    When the user enters those credentials and taps "Log in"
    Then the app shows a loading spinner on the button
    And within 3 seconds the app navigates to "/user/home"
    And the bottom-nav is visible with 5 tabs

  Scenario: Successful admin login
    Given a registered admin with national ID "[REDACTED:thai-id]" and password "Admin#001"
    When the admin enters those credentials and taps "Log in"
    Then the app navigates to "/admin/requests"
    And the admin top-tabs are visible

  Scenario: Wrong password
    Given a registered user with national ID "[REDACTED:thai-id]"
    When the user enters that ID and password "wrong"
    Then a snackbar appears with text "Wrong national ID or password."
    And the password field is cleared and refocused

  Scenario: Bad national ID checksum
    When the user enters national ID "[REDACTED:thai-id]" (invalid checksum)
    Then the ID field shows error "Invalid national ID."
    And the "Log in" button is disabled until the field is fixed

  Scenario: Locked account
    Given a user whose users doc has locked=true
    When the user logs in successfully
    Then the app immediately signs them out
    And a dialog appears: "This account has been locked. Contact your coordinator."
```

    And the submit button is disabled

    Then the submit button remains disabled with a tooltip "Please accept the program terms."

#### Sections

- **Pending**: status == `pending`.
- **Hidden**: rejected, cancelled, failed, confirmed ??? those live in History.

#### Acceptance criteria

```gherkin
Feature: User queue

  Scenario: Queue updates live as status changes
    Given the user has one request in status "pending"
    When an admin approves and assigns a drone
    Then within 2 seconds the queue row updates to "In flight" with ETA and battery
    And a "Track" button appears

  Scenario: Cancel pending
    Given a request in status "pending"
    When the user taps Cancel and confirms
    Then the request is removed from the active list and moves to History as "cancelled"

  Scenario: Empty queue
    Given the user has zero requests
    Then the page shows EmptyState: "No requests yet. Tap Home to submit one."

  Scenario: Delivered awaits confirm
    When a flight transitions to delivered
    Then the row shows status "Delivered ??? confirm receipt" and a "Confirm" button
```

#### State map (visual)

| flight.status | Banner | Map |
|---|---|---|
| `enroute` | "In flight" green | drone moves origin???dest |
| `delivering` | "Arriving ??? get ready" amber | drone hovers at dest |
| `completed` | "Delivered ??? please confirm" blue with CTA | drone at dest |
| `returning` | "Returning to base" grey | drone moves dest???origin |
| `aborted`/`failed` | "Flight aborted: <reason>" red | drone at last known position, then home |

#### Live values

`EtaTicker` (C-14) recomputes ETA + battery from `flight` doc every 1 s. No Firestore writes per second ??? pure local math.

#### Actions

| Element | Action |
|---|---|
| Back | pop |
| "Confirm receipt" (when completed) | navigate to `/user/confirm/:reqId` |
| Weather badge | open weather panel only if role=admin; else snackbar with explanation |

#### Acceptance criteria

```gherkin
Feature: Live drone tracking

  Scenario: Drone moves on screen
    Given a flight in status "enroute" with takeoffAt 60 seconds ago
    When the user opens /user/tracking/:flightId
    Then the drone marker is between origin and destination
    And the marker position updates at 60 fps without Firestore reads

  Scenario: ETA decreases
    Given a flight whose duration is 18 minutes total and 6 minutes elapsed
    Then ETA reads approximately "in 12 min"

  Scenario: Battery animates
    Given batteryAtTakeoff=95 and drain 80%/hr
    After 7.5 minutes the battery readout should be approximately 85% (one decimal tolerance)

  Scenario: Flight aborts during view
    Given the user is watching a tracking page
    When tickFlights marks flight.status=aborted with failureType="weather"
    Then within 2 seconds the banner turns red with text "Flight aborted: weather"
    And a button "Back to Queue" appears

  Scenario: Tracking when flight is gone
    Given the flight document does not exist or belongs to another user
    Then the page shows an ErrorState "Flight not found" and a Back button
```

#### Drone picker logic (`eligibleDronesProvider`)

- Filters: `status=idle`, `maxPayloadKg >= totalWeightKg`, base within `15 km` of destination, `batteryPct >= 30` (configurable, warn at 30???50).
- Sort: by distance ascending, then battery descending.
- If list empty: shows EmptyState with copy "No eligible drone right now. Try again in a few minutes or send to another shift." and disables Assign.

#### Acceptance criteria

```gherkin
Feature: Manage a request

  Scenario: Approve and assign
    Given a pending request with total weight 3.0 kg
    When the admin taps Approve
    Then approveRequest is invoked
    And stock for each item is decremented atomically
    And status becomes "approved"
    And the drone picker section reveals 3 eligible drones

    When the admin selects DRN-001 and taps "Assign DRN-001"
    Then assignDrone({reqId, droneId:"drn-001"}) is invoked
    And a flight document is created with status=enroute
    And drone DRN-001 status becomes "flying"
    And the request status becomes "in_flight"
    And the user receives a push "Drone dispatched"

  Scenario: Reject with reason
    When the admin taps Reject
    Then a dialog asks for a reason from a preset list:
      | reason                |
      | Out of stock          |
      | Weather too dangerous |
      | Out of service area   |
      | Other                 |
    When the admin selects a reason and confirms
    Then rejectRequest({reqId, reason}) is invoked
    And status becomes "rejected" with the chosen reason

  Scenario: Stock insufficient at approve
    Given between viewing and approving, another admin approved a competing request that drained stock
    When the admin taps Approve
    Then approveRequest returns error "OUT_OF_STOCK: <itemName>"
    And a snackbar shows the message and the page reloads stock

  Scenario: No eligible drone
    Given total weight exceeds all available drones' payload (impossible in v1 since max kg = 6)
    Or all drones are flying/maintenance
    Then the picker shows the empty state and Assign is disabled

  Scenario: Reassign after failure
    Given the request is in status "failed" with a previous flight
    Then a banner reads "Previous attempt failed (weather)."
    And the Reassign button opens the drone picker again
    When the admin assigns a new drone
    Then a new flight is created and request status becomes "in_flight"
```

??? Flashlight       0.4 kg   10 in stock  ???
??? ???                                      ???
??????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????
```

Restock opens dialog with quantity stepper (1, 5, 10, custom). Save calls `restockItem`.
Add opens dialog for new item: name, weightKg, initial stock, icon. Calls `createCatalogItem`.

#### Acceptance criteria

```gherkin
Feature: Inventory

  Scenario: Restock
    When admin taps Restock+ for "Food Kit" with quantity 10 and saves
    Then restockItem({itemId:"food-kit", qty:10}) is invoked
    And the visible stock count increases by 10 within 2 seconds

  Scenario: Deactivate
    When admin deactivates "Blanket"
    Then catalog.blanket.active becomes false
    And the item disappears from the user catalog within 2 seconds
```

---

## 7. Flows (F-NN)

### F-01 Register

**Trigger:** user taps "Create account" on P-U-02.
**Preconditions:** all form fields valid (V-01..V-06).
**Steps:**
1. Client calls `FirebaseAuth.createUserWithEmailAndPassword("<id>@drone-aid.local", password)`.
2. `onUserCreated` trigger fires server-side, provisions `users/{uid}`.
3. Client awaits `users/{uid}` doc exists, then reads role.
4. Router redirects to `/user/home` (role=user) or `/admin/requests` (role=admin).
**Postconditions:** authenticated session, `users/{uid}` exists with role + delivered profile fields.
**Errors:** E-05 ID already registered, E-06 weak password, E-07 network failure.

```gherkin
Feature: Register flow
  Scenario: Happy path
    Given a fresh national ID and valid form
    When the user submits
    Then within 5 s they land on /user/home
  Scenario: ID already exists
    When the user submits an ID that is already taken
    Then they see error E-05 inline
```

### F-02 Login

**Trigger:** user taps "Log in" on P-U-01.
**Steps:**
1. `signInWithEmailAndPassword`.
2. Read `users/{uid}.role` to pick shell.
3. Router pushes shell.
**Errors:** E-01 wrong creds, E-02 invalid checksum, E-03 locked, E-04 network.

### F-03 Logout

**Trigger:** user taps "Log out" on P-U-09.
**Steps:**
1. Confirm dialog.
2. Delete this device's FCM token from `users/{uid}.fcmTokens`.
3. `FirebaseAuth.signOut()`.
4. Router redirects to `/login`.

### F-04 Edit profile field

**Trigger:** user edits a field on P-U-09.
**Steps:**
1. Inline edit input replaces label.
2. On Enter or blur ??? `updateProfile({field, value})`.
3. Success shows "Saved" for 1 s.
**Errors:** E-08 validation, E-04 network.

### F-05 Set delivery pin

**Trigger:** user taps Edit on the delivery pin row.
**Steps:**
1. Push `MapPinPicker` (C-13) with current pin as initial.
2. User drags marker; tap "Use this location".
3. Reverse-geocode (optional) ??? label.
4. `updateProfile({deliveryAddress})`.

### F-06 Add to cart

**Trigger:** user taps a catalog row on P-U-03.
**Steps:**
1. `ItemPickerSheet` (C-05) opens with item details.
2. User selects quantity (default 1).
3. Tap Add ??? cart provider gains the row.
4. WeightBar recomputes.
**Errors:** E-09 item out of stock (button disabled).

### F-07 Submit request

**Trigger:** user taps Submit on P-U-03.
**Preconditions:** cart non-empty, weight ??? 6.0 kg, delivery pin set.
**Steps:**
1. Client builds payload `{items, deliveryAddress, priority, notes}`.
2. Calls `submitRequest` callable.
3. Server validates: each item exists + is active + stock >= qty; total weight ??? maxPayloadKg; user role=user.
4. Server creates `requests/{reqId}` with status=pending, decremented nothing yet.
5. Server FCMs all admins with new-request push.
6. Client clears cart, navigates to /user/queue with snackbar.
**Errors:** E-10 weight exceeded, E-11 stock changed, E-04 network.

### F-08 Watch queue

**Trigger:** user navigates to /user/queue.
**Steps:** stream from Firestore, render sections per status group. Live updates on any field change.

### F-09 Cancel pending request

**Trigger:** user taps Cancel on a pending row.
**Steps:**
1. ConfirmDialog.
2. `cancelRequest({reqId})`.
3. Server checks status == pending, sets status=cancelled.
**Errors:** E-12 already approved (server rejects with code, snackbar shown).

### F-10 View tracking

**Trigger:** user taps Track on queue or notification deep-link.
**Steps:** subscribe to `flights/{flightId}`, compute live position + battery via C-04 + C-14.
**Sub-flows:** F-10a state transition shown live; F-10b abort banner.

### F-11 Tap notification

**Trigger:** user taps a row in /user/notifications, OR taps an FCM push.
**Steps:**
1. Notification doc updated with `readAt`.
2. Router navigates per `type`:
  - `request_approved` ??? /user/queue

1	# Belle's shared widgets ship as API stubs on Day 4, full bodies later
2	
3	Belle owns four shared widgets (`DroneMap`, `BatteryBar`, `StatusChip`, `ItemPicker`) that Bew, Poom, and Tawan all need to consume. The naive sequencing ??? Belle finishes all four widget bodies before others can start ??? leaves 3 devs idle for ~3 days and makes Belle the single critical-path blocker for the demo. Instead, Belle commits a single PR on Day 4 (2026-05-25) containing all four widget files with **frozen public APIs (constructor params, callback signatures) but placeholder bodies** (e.g. `Container` returning the right size). Consumers import and code against the real API from Day 4; Belle iterates the rendering inside the widgets across Days 5-7 without breaking consumers.
4	
5	## Consequences
6	
7	- Belle's Day 4 PR is treated as an **API freeze** ??? any public API change after that requires coordination with Bew/Poom/Tawan.
8	- Reviewers (especially Aok) prioritise the Day 4 widget-API PR even at the cost of pausing their own work, because it unblocks 3 devs.
9	- Consumers must tolerate placeholder visuals during Days 4-7 and avoid coupling to internal widget implementation details.
10	- If a widget API turns out to be wrong, the cost is a coordinated multi-file PR, not a re-architecting of the consumer pages.
11

# Belle's shared widgets ship as API stubs on Day 4, full bodies later

Belle owns four shared widgets (`DroneMap`, `BatteryBar`, `StatusChip`, `ItemPicker`) that Bew, Poom, and Tawan all need to consume. The naive sequencing ??? Belle finishes all four widget bodies before others can start ??? leaves 3 devs idle for ~3 days and makes Belle the single critical-path blocker for the demo. Instead, Belle commits a single PR on Day 4 (2026-05-25) containing all four widget files with **frozen public APIs (constructor params, callback signatures) but placeholder bodies** (e.g. `Container` returning the right size). Consumers import and code against the real API from Day 4; Belle iterates the rendering inside the widgets across Days 5-7 without breaking consumers.

## Consequences

- Belle's Day 4 PR is treated as an **API freeze** ??? any public API change after that requires coordination with Bew/Poom/Tawan.
- Reviewers (especially Aok) prioritise the Day 4 widget-API PR even at the cost of pausing their own work, because it unblocks 3 devs.
- Consumers must tolerate placeholder visuals during Days 4-7 and avoid coupling to internal widget implementation details.
- If a widget API turns out to be wrong, the cost is a coordinated multi-file PR, not a re-architecting of the consumer pages.

1	# Drone Relief Delivery ??? Design Spec
2	
3	- **Date:** 2026-05-19
4	- **Project:** CSC291 group project, KMUTT
5	- **Team size:** 5 developers
6	- **Timeline:** 2 weeks (10 working days)
7	- **Status:** Approved by user, pending team review
8	
9	---
10	
11	## 1. Problem & Goal
12	
13	Build a **mobile application** that simulates drone-based delivery of relief supplies to civilians impacted by war. The app has two role-switched portals inside a single Flutter codebase:
14	
15	- **User portal** ??? request supplies, watch the assigned drone fly in real time, confirm receipt.
16	- **Admin portal** ??? manage requests, dispatch drones, monitor the fleet, control simulated weather and inventory.
17	
18	The drone fleet is **fully simulated** (no real flight hardware). Each drone has a 15 km radius reachable in ~1 hour under clear weather; bad weather slows it; battery and mechanical faults can abort flights.
19	
20	### Goals
21	- Realistic end-to-end delivery flow under multi-user, real-time conditions.
22	- Demonstrable failure modes (weather/battery/mechanical) drive admin reassignment.
23	- Server-of-truth state in Firestore; all clients see the same drone position and queue.
24	- Auditable Claude Code usage (per-dev session logs in repo) per professor's requirement.
25	
26	### Non-goals (explicit cut for 2 weeks)
27	- Real weather API integration (admin manually sets weather).
28	- Real SMS/OTP auth (synthetic email under the hood; phone is profile data only).
29	- Real payment / fee / scoring system.
30	- Admin analytics dashboard, audit log (deferred).
31	- iOS push notifications (Android FCM only; iOS push is stretch).
32	- KYC / national ID government verification (format + checksum only).
33	
34	---
35	
36	## 2. Tech Stack
37	
38	| Layer | Choice |
39	|---|---|
40	| Mobile client | **Flutter** (Android primary, iOS stretch) |
41	| State management | **Riverpod** |
42	| Routing | **go_router** |
43	| Map | **flutter_map** + OpenStreetMap tiles (no API key) |
44	| Auth | Firebase Auth (email/password, synthetic email `<id>@drone-aid.local`) |
45	| Database | **Firestore** (realtime) |
46	| Backend logic | **Firebase Cloud Functions** (TypeScript) |
47	| Push | **Firebase Cloud Messaging** (FCM) |
48	| Scheduled jobs | Cloud Functions `onSchedule` (every 60s) |
49	| Local dev | Firebase Emulator Suite (Auth + Firestore + Functions) |
50	| CI/CD | GitHub Actions |
51	
52	Why not a separate Hono/Elysia backend: Cloud Functions covers callable RPC + scheduled cron + Firestore triggers natively; Firestore covers realtime streams; pulling in a self-hosted server adds Docker + Cloud Run + WebSocket plumbing that the 2-week scope can't absorb. If the team later wants Hono experience, a `functions/` callable can be ported to Hono on Cloud Run without changing the data model.
53	
54	---
55	
56	## 3. Architecture
57	
58	```
59	Flutter app (single APK/IPA)
60	  USER screens | ADMIN screens | SHARED (auth, profile, settings)
61	       ??????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????????
62	                Repository layer
63	                     ???
64	              Riverpod providers
65	                     ???
66	       Firebase SDK (Auth / Firestore / FCM / Functions)
67	                     ???
68	                     ???
69	???????????????????????????????????????????????????  FIREBASE  ???????????????????????????????????????????????????
70	 Auth        Firestore        Cloud Functions      FCM
71	                                  callable: submitRequest, approveRequest,
72	                                            rejectRequest, assignDrone,
73	                                            confirmDelivery, cancelRequest,
74	                                            setWeather, restockItem,
75	                                            toggleDroneMaintenance
76	                                  scheduled: tickFlights (every 60s)
77	                                  triggers : onFlightWritten -> FCM fan-out
78	```
79	
80	### Key decisions
81	
82	- **One Flutter codebase, role-switched.** `users/{uid}.role` decides which navigator tree mounts after login. No separate admin app.
83	- **Repository layer** wraps Firestore. Screens never touch the SDK directly; allows mocks in widget tests.
84	- **Drone position computed client-side** from `flightPlan` (origin, destination, takeoffAt, speedKmh, weatherModifier). Server only writes state transitions. Eliminates per-second writes, keeps free tier safe.
85	- **State-changing admin actions go through callable Cloud Functions**, never direct Firestore writes. Lets us keep rules simple and centralize business logic + atomic transactions.
86	
87	---
88	
89	## 4. Data Model (Firestore)
90	
91	### Collections
92	
93	```
94	users/{uid}
95	  nationalId         "[REDACTED:thai-id]"     (unique, indexed)
96	  name               string
97	  phone              string
98	  role               "user" | "admin"
99	  deliveryAddress    { lat, lng, label } | null
100	  locked             bool
101	  fcmTokens          [string]            (registered devices)
102	  createdAt          ts
103	
104	users/{uid}/notifications/{nid}
105	  type, title, body, requestId?, flightId?, readAt, createdAt
106	
107	catalog/{itemId}
108	  name, weightKg, stock, icon, active
109	
110	requests/{reqId}
111	  userId
112	  items              [{ catalogId, qty }]
113	  totalWeightKg
114	  deliveryAddress    (snapshot at submit time)
115	  priority           "normal" | "urgent"
116	  status             "pending" | "approved" | "rejected" | "in_flight"
117	                     | "delivered" | "confirmed" | "failed" | "cancelled"
118	  notes
119	  decidedBy, decidedAt, rejectReason
120	  currentFlightId
121	  createdAt
122	
123	drones/{droneId}
124	  name               "DRN-001"
125	  status             "idle" | "flying" | "charging" | "maintenance" | "offline"
126	  batteryPct         0..100
127	  baseLocation       { lat, lng }
128	  maxPayloadKg       6.0
129	  currentFlightId    flightId | null
130	  lastSeenAt
131	
132	flights/{flightId}
133	  droneId, requestId, userId
134	  status             "enroute" | "delivering" | "returning"
135	                     | "completed" | "aborted" | "failed"
136	  origin, destination
137	  takeoffAt, etaAt
138	  speedKmh           15 (default; weather drops it)
139	  weatherModifierAtTakeoff  1.0 | 0.7 | 0.0
140	  batteryAtTakeoff
141	  failureType        null | "weather" | "battery" | "mechanical"
142	  tickHistory        [ { ts, lat, lng, batteryPct, event } ]  (capped, optional)
143	
144	weather/current   (single document)
145	  state              "clear" | "wind" | "storm"
146	  updatedBy, updatedAt
147	```
148	
149	### Modeling notes
150	
151	- **Flight separate from request.** A request may spawn multiple flight attempts (reassign after failure). Request is "what user wants"; flight is "delivery attempt".
152	- **Snapshot address on request** so request retains original target even if user later moves the pin.
153	- **Stock lives on catalog**, decremented atomically inside `approveRequest`.
154	- **Position is derived, not stored.** Saves ~3,600 writes/hour per active drone.
155	
156	---
157	
158	## 5. Auth, Roles, Identity
159	
160	- Registration form collects: national ID (13 digits + checksum validated), password, name, phone, optional delivery pin.
161	- Firebase Auth uses synthetic email `<id>@drone-aid.local` so the email/password provider works without real email.
162	- On first sign-in, a Cloud Function trigger (`onUserCreated`) provisions `users/{uid}` with `role: "user"`.
163	- Admin accounts are seeded via `seedAdmins.ts` script (one-time, idempotent).
164	- ID checksum logic lives in `app/lib/utils/thai_id_validator.dart` AND `functions/src/lib/id.ts`; both validated by tests.
165	
166	---
167	
168	## 6. Pages
169	
170	### User portal (8 screens)
171	1. **Login / Register** ??? ID + password.
172	2. **Home / Request** ??? catalog browse, qty picker, address pin on map, submit. Calls `submitRequest`.
173	3. **Queue** ??? own requests, live status. Streams `requests where userId == me`.
174	4. **Tracking** ??? live map of your drone (filtered to current flight). Streams `flights/{currentFlightId}`; position interpolated client-side.
175	5. **Confirm** ??? appears when status == `delivered`; tap to call `confirmDelivery`.
176	6. **History** ??? completed / failed / cancelled requests.
177	7. **Notifications** ??? in-app inbox; mirrors FCM events.
178	8. **Profile + Settings** ??? edit name, phone, delivery pin, language, logout.
179	
180	### Admin portal (7 screens)
181	1. **Control (live map)** ??? all currently flying drones.
182	2. **Drone list** ??? all drones incl. offline + maintenance.
183	3. **Drone detail** ??? status, battery, current flight, future queue.
184	4. **Requests** ??? list of all incoming, filters (status, priority).
185	5. **Request manage** ??? open one request, see user profile, approve/reject. On approve, picker shows eligible drones (idle, payload ??? totalWeightKg, base within range).
186	6. **Weather panel** ??? set global weather (clear / wind / storm).
187	7. **Supply inventory** ??? list items, restock, toggle active.
188	
189	---
190	
191	## 7. End-to-end flow
192	
193	```
194	USER                          BACKEND                          ADMIN
195	[Request page]
196	  submit ??????????????????????????????  submitRequest()
197	                       validate items + stock + weight ??? max drone payload
198	                       create requests/{id} status=pending
199	                       FCM ping admins ????????????????????????????????????????????????  [Request list]
200	
201	                                                            [Request manage]
202	                                                              approve / reject
203	
204	                       approveRequest({reqId})  ?????????????????????
205	                         tx: stock decrement, status=approved
206	                         return eligible drones
207	
208	                                                              pick drone
209	                       assignDrone({reqId, droneId})  ?????????????????????
210	                         tx: create flights/{id} status=enroute
211	                             takeoffAt=now()
212	                             etaAt = now + distance / (speedKmh ?? weatherMod)
213	                         drone.status=flying, drone.currentFlightId=flightId
214	                         request.status=in_flight, request.currentFlightId=flightId
215	                         FCM ping user ??????????????????
216	[Tracking page]                                             [Control map]
217	  drone moves live                                            drone visible
218	
219	       ??????????????? tickFlights (every 60s) ???????????????
220	         roll failures, advance status
221	
222	       (no failure)
223	         delivering ??? completed
224	         request.status=delivered
225	         FCM ping user ??????????????????
226	[Confirm page]
227	  ??? confirm ?????????????????????  confirmDelivery({reqId})
228	                       request.status=confirmed
229	                       drone.status=returning ??? tick brings home ??? idle
230	```
231	
232	Failure branch:
233	```
234	tick rolls failureType ??? {weather, battery, mechanical}
235	  flight.status = aborted or failed
236	  request.status = failed
237	  drone.status = idle (if battery > 0) | maintenance
238	  FCM ping user + admin
239	```
240	
241	---
242	
243	## 8. Drone simulator engine
244	
245	### Scheduled tick (Cloud Function, every 60s)
246	```
247	tickFlights():
248	  weather = read weather/current
249	  flights = query flights where status in [enroute, delivering, returning]
250	
251	  for f in flights:
252	    elapsed_hr      = (now - f.takeoffAt) / 3600
253	    distance_km     = haversine(f.origin, f.destination)
254	    effective_speed = f.speedKmh ?? weatherMod(weather, f.status)
255	    progress        = clamp(elapsed_hr ?? effective_speed / distance_km, 0, 1)
256	    battery         = f.batteryAtTakeoff ??? elapsed_hr ?? DRAIN_PER_HR(weather)
257	
258	    if f.status == enroute:
259	      if weather == storm and rand() < 0.20: ??? abort("weather")
260	      if battery < 15                      : ??? abort("battery")
261	      if rand() < 0.01                     : ??? abort("mechanical")
262	
263	    if aborted:
264	      f.failureType, f.status = aborted | failed
265	      request.status = failed
266	      drone.status = idle | maintenance
267	      notify(user, admin)
268	
269	    elif progress >= 1.0 and f.status == enroute:
270	      f.status = delivering          # 60s soft hold for "landing"
271	      notify(user, "drone arriving")
272	
273	    elif progress >= 1.0 and f.status == delivering:
274	      f.status = completed
275	      request.status = delivered
276	      notify(user, "please confirm")
277	
278	    elif progress >= 1.0 and f.status == returning:
279	      drone.status = idle, drone.location = base
280	      f.archived = true
281	```
282	
283	### Client position math (every animation frame)
284	```
285	elapsed_hr  = (now ??? flight.takeoffAt) / 3600
286	duration_hr = haversine(origin, dest) / (speedKmh ?? weatherModifierAtTakeoff)
287	t = clamp(elapsed_hr / duration_hr, 0, 1)
288	lat = lerp(origin.lat, dest.lat, t)
289	lng = lerp(origin.lng, dest.lng, t)
290	battery = batteryAtTakeoff ??? elapsed_hr ?? DRAIN_PER_HR
291	```
292	
293	### Tunable constants
294	| Constant | Default |
295	|---|---|
296	| Base speed | 15 km/h |
297	| Weather modifier (clear / wind / storm) | 1.0 / 0.7 / 0.0 (storm grounds) |
298	| Battery drain (base / storm) | 80 / 120 %/hr |
299	| Storm abort dice per tick | 20% |
300	| Battery-low threshold | 15% |
301	| Mechanical dice per tick | 1% |
302	| Delivering hold | 60s |
303	
304	**`weatherMod(weather, status)`** ??? returns 1.0 if status is `delivering` (drone is hovering/landing, weather only affects ground risk via mechanical dice). Otherwise returns the table value above. `returning` uses the same modifier as `enroute`.
305	
306	**`etaAt`** ??? set at flight creation: `takeoffAt + (distance_km / (speedKmh ?? weatherModifierAtTakeoff)) ?? 3600s`. Re-derived client-side every frame as the user watches.
307	
308	---
309	
310	## 9. Security rules (Firestore)
311	
312	```
313	users/{uid}
314	  read    : self OR admin
315	  create  : self (during register); role forced to "user"
316	  update  : self for profile fields; admin for {role, locked}
317	
318	catalog/{id}      read auth ; write admin only
319	drones/{id}       read auth ; write admin only (and Functions on tick)
320	weather/current   read auth ; write admin only
321	
322	requests/{id}
323	  read    : owner OR admin
324	  create  : self if userId == auth.uid AND status == "pending"
325	  update  : DENY (must go through callable)
326	
327	flights/{id}
328	  read    : owner of linked request OR admin
329	  write   : DENY (Functions only)
330	
331	users/{uid}/notifications/{nid}
332	  read    : self
333	  write   : DENY (Functions only)
334	```
335	
336	Rules tested via `@firebase/rules-unit-testing` in `firestore.rules.test.ts` (CI gate).
337	
338	---
339	
340	## 10. Callable Cloud Functions (the API surface)
341	
342	**User-callable:**
343	- `submitRequest(items[], deliveryAddress, priority?, notes?)`
344	- `cancelRequest(reqId)` ??? only while pending
345	- `confirmDelivery(reqId)`
346	- `updateProfile(fields)`
347	
348	**Admin-callable:**
349	- `approveRequest(reqId)`
350	- `rejectRequest(reqId, reason)`
351	- `assignDrone(reqId, droneId)`
352	- `setWeather(state)`
353	- `restockItem(itemId, qty)`
354	- `toggleDroneMaintenance(droneId, on)`
355	- `createCatalogItem(itemData)`
356	
357	**Internal / scheduled:**
358	- `tickFlights` ??? every 60s via `onSchedule`.
359	- `onFlightWritten` ??? Firestore trigger, fans out FCM pushes on state transitions.
360	- `onUserCreated` ??? Auth trigger, provisions `users/{uid}` with role=user.
361	
362	Every callable runs as `https.onCall`, validates `context.auth`, enforces role inside the function body.
363	
364	---
365	
366	## 11. Repository layout
367	
368	```
369	csc291/
370	????????? app/                            Flutter mobile app
371	???   ????????? lib/
372	???   ???   ????????? main.dart
373	???   ???   ????????? core/                   auth gate, router, theme, env
374	???   ???   ????????? data/
375	???   ???   ???   ????????? models/             User, Request, Drone, Flight, CatalogItem
376	???   ???   ???   ????????? repositories/       *_repo.dart
377	???   ???   ????????? providers/              Riverpod providers
378	???   ???   ????????? features/
379	???   ???   ???   ????????? auth/
380	???   ???   ???   ????????? user/
381	???   ???   ???   ????????? admin/
382	???   ???   ????????? widgets/                DroneMap, StatusChip, ItemPicker, BatteryBar
383	???   ???   ????????? utils/                  geo.dart, thai_id_validator.dart, time_fmt.dart
384	???   ????????? assets/
385	???   ????????? test/
386	???   ????????? pubspec.yaml
387	????????? functions/
388	???   ????????? src/
389	???   ???   ????????? index.ts
390	???   ???   ????????? callable/
391	???   ???   ????????? scheduled/
392	???   ???   ????????? triggers/
393	???   ???   ????????? lib/                    sim/, geo.ts, weather.ts, fcm.ts, id.ts
394	???   ???   ????????? seed/
395	???   ????????? package.json
396	???   ????????? tsconfig.json
397	????????? firestore.rules
398	????????? firestore.indexes.json
399	????????? firebase.json
400	????????? docs/
401	???   ????????? superpowers/specs/
402	???   ????????? agent-logs/                 see ??13
403	????????? scripts/
404	???   ????????? copy-claude-session.ps1
405	???   ????????? copy-claude-session.sh
406	???   ????????? redact-secrets.py
407	???   ????????? build-log-index.py
408	????????? .claude/
409	???   ????????? agents/                     see ??14
410	???   ????????? settings.json
411	???   ????????? commands/
412	????????? .github/
413	???   ????????? workflows/                  see ??15
414	???   ????????? CODEOWNERS
415	???   ????????? pull_request_template.md
416	???   ????????? ISSUE_TEMPLATE/
417	????????? .gitattributes
418	????????? README.md
419	```
420	
421	---
422	
423	## 12. Team split & 2-week timeline
424	
425	### Owners (5 devs)
426	| Dev | Owns |
427	|---|---|
428	| A | Auth + register + profile + settings + shared core (router, theme, ID validator) |
429	| B | User request flow: catalog browse, cart, pin picker, submit, queue, history |
430	| C | User tracking + confirm + notifications inbox + FCM client + DroneMap widget |
431	| D | All admin pages: control, drone list, drone detail, requests, manage, weather, inventory |
432	| E | Backend: Firestore rules, seed scripts, all Cloud Functions, sim engine, FCM, deploy |
433	
434	### Day-by-day
435	**Week 1 ??? foundation + happy path**
436	- **Day 1** ??? E: Firebase project, rules v0, models, seed. A: Flutter scaffold, theme, go_router, Riverpod. All: emulator setup.
437	- **Day 2** ??? A: login + register + ID validator (with tests). E: `onUserCreated` trigger. B/C/D: model classes + repository stubs.
438	- **Day 3** ??? B: catalog browse + cart. D: admin requests list (read). E: `submitRequest` callable + tests.
439	- **Day 4** ??? B: submit + queue (live stream). D: request manage approve/reject. E: `approveRequest` + `rejectRequest` + stock tx.
440	- **Day 5** ??? C: tracking page + interpolation math. D: drone list + detail. E: `assignDrone` + flight doc + `tickFlights` v0 (movement only).
441	
442	**Week 2 ??? failures, polish, demo**
443	- **Day 6** ??? C: confirm + `confirmDelivery` wiring. D: control live map. E: state transitions (delivered ??? completed).
444	- **Day 7** ??? E: failure dice (weather/battery/mechanical). D: weather panel. B: history.
445	- **Day 8** ??? A/C: FCM device setup + notifications inbox. E: `onFlightWritten` ??? FCM. D: inventory + restock.
446	- **Day 9** ??? All: integration testing on emulator + real Firebase dev project. Bug bash.
447	- **Day 10** ??? All: demo data seed, polish, screenshots, video, README.
448	
449	### Risks & mitigations
450	| Risk | Mitigation |
451	|---|---|
452	| Firestore rules deny silently | Emulator from Day 1, rules unit tests in CI |
453	| First tick cold-start lag | Min instances = 1 on `tickFlights`, or accept first-90s delay |
454	| Map perf with many markers | Cap demo fleet at 8???12 drones |
455	| Thai ID checksum bugs | Validator + tests on Day 2 |
456	| iOS push needs APNs cert | Android FCM only; iOS push is stretch |
457	| 5-dev integration drift | Daily 15-min sync + shared seed dataset |
458	
459	---
460	
461	## 13. Claude Code agent-log storage
462	
463	### Goal
464	Per professor's requirement, every team member must have their Claude Code session logs. Centralize in the repo so the prof can audit via `git clone`.
465	
466	### Layout
467	```
468	docs/agent-logs/
469	????????? README.md           rules, dev-handle table, setup steps
470	????????? _index.md           auto-generated index (date, dev, session, summary)
471	????????? alice/
472	???   ????????? 2026-05-19_8f3c-...jsonl
473	???   ????????? 2026-05-20_a91b-...jsonl
474	????????? bee/
475	????????? chai/
476	????????? dao/
477	????????? eve/
478	```
479	
480	### Per-dev setup (one-time)
481	1. Clone repo, pick a dev handle, create folder `docs/agent-logs/<handle>/`.
482	2. Add a `SessionEnd` hook to `~/.claude/settings.json`:
483	   ```json
484	   {
485	     "hooks": {
486	       "SessionEnd": [{
487	         "matcher": "",
488	         "hooks": [{
489	           "type": "command",
490	           "command": "pwsh -File <repo>/scripts/copy-claude-session.ps1"
491	         }]
492	       }]
493	     }
494	   }
495	   ```
496	   (mac/linux uses `scripts/copy-claude-session.sh`.)
497	3. Script copies `~/.claude/projects/D--projects-csc291/<session>.jsonl` to `docs/agent-logs/<handle>/<date>_<session>.jsonl`, piping through `redact-secrets.py`.
498	4. End of day: `git add docs/agent-logs/<handle>/ && git commit -m "logs: <date>"`.
499	
500	### Redaction (`scripts/redact-secrets.py`)
501	Strips before write:
502	- Google API keys: `AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}`
503	- OpenAI/Anthropic-shaped: `sk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}`
504	- OAuth tokens: `ya29\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]+`
505	- Firebase service account JSON blobs (anything with `private_key` field)
506	- Bearer tokens: `Bearer [A-Za-z0-9._-]{20,}`
507	- Email + 13-digit Thai national ID patterns ??? `[REDACTED]`
508	
509	### Repo hygiene
510	- `.gitattributes`: `docs/agent-logs/**/*.jsonl -diff linguist-vendored=true` ??? clean PR diffs, marked vendored on GitHub.
511	- `_index.md` regenerated by `scripts/build-log-index.py`, runs in CI on push (see ??15).
512	- Daily commit rule, not per-session ??? keeps history clean.
513	
514	---
515	
516	## 14. Project subagents (`.claude/agents/`)
517	
518	Committed to repo. Whole team uses the same definitions.
519	
520	| Agent | Role | Tools | Model |
521	|---|---|---|---|
522	| **architect** | Design, schema change proposal, API shape before code | Read, Grep, Glob, WebFetch | opus |
523	| **engineer** | Implement approved design: Flutter pages, Cloud Functions, refactors | Read, Edit, Write, Grep, Glob, Bash | sonnet |
524	| **qa** | Unit + widget + integration tests, emulator runs, rules tests | Read, Edit, Write, Grep, Glob, Bash | sonnet |
525	| **security-reviewer** | Pre-merge audit: rules holes, auth bypass, secret leaks, input validation, callable authorization | Read, Grep, Glob, Bash | opus |
526	
527	Each agent file (`.claude/agents/<name>.md`) holds frontmatter (name, description, tools, model) + a system prompt that pins the role's responsibilities, refusal boundaries, and output format.
528	
529	---
530	
531	## 15. GitHub workflows (`.github/workflows/`)
532	
533	### CI (`ci.yml`) ??? runs on PR and push
534	| Job | Purpose |
535	|---|---|
536	| `flutter-test` | `flutter analyze` + `flutter test` in `app/`, pub cache enabled |
537	| `functions-test` | `npm ci` + `npm run lint` + `npm test` in `functions/` |
538	| `rules-test` | Firestore emulator + `@firebase/rules-unit-testing` against `firestore.rules` |
539	| `secrets-scan` | `gitleaks` on diff; fails if a key pattern slipped past redactor |
540	| `log-presence` | PR must add at least one new `*.jsonl` under `docs/agent-logs/<author-handle>/` if any source file changed. Author handle resolved via `docs/agent-logs/README.md` GitHub-username ??? handle table. Enforces the class rule. |
541	
542	### Deploy
543	~~`deploy-functions.yml`~~ + ~~`deploy-rules.yml`~~ ??? **deferred, emulator-only**. The class submission runs entirely against the Firebase Emulator Suite on each developer's laptop. To re-enable auto-deploy later, recreate the workflows from git history and add the `FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT` repo secret. See `docs/adr/0002-scope-full-features-fcm-emulator-exempt.md`.
544	
545	### Housekeeping
546	- `build-log-index.yml` ??? on push to `docs/agent-logs/**`: regenerate `_index.md`, commit back with `[skip ci]`.
547	- `claude-review.yml` *(optional, can be dropped to save API budget)* ??? on PR, invoke the `security-reviewer` subagent against the diff, post findings as PR comment.
548	
549	### Repo settings
550	- Single Firebase project `droneaid-csc291` configured in `.firebaserc` but not deployed for the class submission ??? local emulator only.
551	- ~~Service account in GitHub Actions secret `FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT`.~~ Deferred until deploy is re-enabled.
552	- `main` branch protected: require CI green + 1 reviewer.
553	- Branch convention: `feat/<short>`, PR back to `main`.
554	
555	---
556	
557	## 16. Acceptance criteria (definition of done)
558	
559	- A user can register with a valid Thai national ID + password, log in, and reach the Request page.
560	- A user can submit a request with 1+ catalog items totaling ??? a drone's max payload.
561	- An admin can see the new request appear live in the Requests list, open it, approve it, and pick an eligible drone.
562	- After assignment, the user sees the drone moving on the Tracking page in real time, with live battery + ETA.
563	- Storm weather (set by admin) can abort an in-flight drone; user + admin both receive notification.
564	- A delivered (non-failed) request triggers the Confirm page; confirmation moves it to History.
565	- Drone returns to base after success or failure and resets to `idle`.
566	- All Firestore writes are mediated by Cloud Functions or guarded by rules; direct client writes to `requests`/`flights`/`drones`/`notifications` are denied.
567	- CI passes on `main`: flutter tests, functions tests, rules tests, gitleaks, log-presence.
568	- Every dev has at least one Claude Code session log under `docs/agent-logs/<handle>/` for every day they committed code.
569	- Demo dataset seeds: 8 drones, 6 catalog items, 1 admin, 3 demo users.
570	
571	---
572	
573	## 17. Open questions (resolve during implementation)
574	
575	- Localization: Thai-only, English-only, or both? (Default: Thai with English fallback.)
576	- Demo geographic region centroid + extent? (Default: Bangkok metro, 15 km radius.)
577	- Auto-confirm if user doesn't tap Confirm within N hours? (Default: no, leave it for admin to flag.)
578	- Drone re-charge time after returning? (Default: instantaneous for demo; can add 5-min cooldown if time permits.)
