content.content:
1	# DroneAid ??? Claude Code SessionEnd hook (Windows / PowerShell).
2	#
3	# Copies the most-recently-modified Claude Code session JSONL for THIS project
4	# into docs/agent-logs/<your-handle>/, redacted of secrets via redact-secrets.py.
5	#
6	# Setup:
7	#   1. setx DRONE_AID_HANDLE aok       # one of: aok belle bew poom tawan
8	#      (reopen terminal so the new env var is picked up)
9	#   2. Add a SessionEnd hook to %USERPROFILE%\.claude\settings.json that calls
10	#      this script. See docs/agent-logs/README.md for the JSON snippet.
11	#
12	# Idempotent ??? running twice on the same session overwrites the same target file.
13	
14	$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
15	
16	# Resolve repo root (the directory two levels above this script).
17	$RepoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "..")).Path
18	
19	# Per-dev handle (folder name under docs/agent-logs).
20	$Handle = $env:DRONE_AID_HANDLE
21	if (-not $Handle) {
22	    Write-Error "DRONE_AID_HANDLE is not set. Run e.g. 'setx DRONE_AID_HANDLE aok' and reopen the terminal."
23	    exit 1
24	}
25	
26	# Per-project Claude Code session directory. Claude Code encodes the absolute
27	# repo path by replacing each '/', '\', and ':' with '-'. So a clone at
28	# C:\Users\Belle\Projects\CSC291-DroneAid becomes
29	# C--Users-Belle-Projects-CSC291-DroneAid under %USERPROFILE%\.claude\projects.
30	$Encoded = ($RepoRoot -replace '[\\:/]', '-')
31	$SessionDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".claude\projects\$Encoded"
32	
33	# Fallback 1: legacy hard-coded encoding from the original template (kept for
34	# back-compat with anyone whose clone was already wired up to D:\projects\csc291).
35	if (-not (Test-Path $SessionDir)) {
36	    $Fallback = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".claude\projects\D--projects-csc291"
37	    if (Test-Path $Fallback) { $SessionDir = $Fallback }
38	}
39	
40	# Fallback 2: if neither path exists, glob the newest folder under
41	# .claude\projects\ whose name contains this repo's leaf directory. Handy for
42	# renamed clones (e.g. CSC291-DroneAid-belle-fork).
43	if (-not (Test-Path $SessionDir)) {
44	    $RepoLeaf = Split-Path $RepoRoot -Leaf
45	    $Candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path (Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".claude\projects") -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue `
46	        | Where-Object { $_.Name -like "*$RepoLeaf*" } `
47	        | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending `
48	        | Select-Object -First 1
49	    if ($Candidate) { $SessionDir = $Candidate.FullName }
50	}
51	
52	if (-not (Test-Path $SessionDir)) {
53	    Write-Host "No Claude Code session dir found for this clone."
54	    Write-Host "Looked under $env:USERPROFILE\.claude\projects\ for an encoded path matching $Encoded."
55	    exit 0
56	}
57	
58	# Newest *.jsonl in that directory.
59	$Latest = Get-ChildItem -Path $SessionDir -Filter *.jsonl -File `
60	    | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending `
61	    | Select-Object -First 1
62	
63	if (-not $Latest) {
64	    Write-Host "No .jsonl session files found in $SessionDir."
65	    exit 0
66	}
67	
68	# Resolve python (prefer py launcher on Windows).
69	$Py = (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
70	if (-not $Py) { $Py = (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) }
71	if (-not $Py) {
72	    Write-Error "Python not found. Install Python 3.13 (or higher) and re-run."
73	    exit 1
74	}
75	
76	# Target path under docs/agent-logs.
77	$Date = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd"
78	$TargetDir = Join-Path $RepoRoot "docs\agent-logs\$Handle"
79	$TargetFile = Join-Path $TargetDir "$Date`_$($Latest.BaseName).jsonl"
80

# DroneAid ??? Claude Code SessionEnd hook (Windows / PowerShell).
#
# Copies the most-recently-modified Claude Code session JSONL for THIS project
# into docs/agent-logs/<your-handle>/, redacted of secrets via redact-secrets.py.
#
# Setup:
#   1. setx DRONE_AID_HANDLE aok       # one of: aok belle bew poom tawan
#      (reopen terminal so the new env var is picked up)
#   2. Add a SessionEnd hook to %USERPROFILE%\.claude\settings.json that calls
#      this script. See docs/agent-logs/README.md for the JSON snippet.
#
# Idempotent ??? running twice on the same session overwrites the same target file.

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

# Resolve repo root (the directory two levels above this script).
$RepoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "..")).Path

# Per-dev handle (folder name under docs/agent-logs).
$Handle = $env:DRONE_AID_HANDLE
if (-not $Handle) {
    Write-Error "DRONE_AID_HANDLE is not set. Run e.g. 'setx DRONE_AID_HANDLE aok' and reopen the terminal."
    exit 1
}

# Per-project Claude Code session directory. Claude Code encodes the absolute
# repo path by replacing each '/', '\', and ':' with '-'. So a clone at
# C:\Users\Belle\Projects\CSC291-DroneAid becomes
# C--Users-Belle-Projects-CSC291-DroneAid under %USERPROFILE%\.claude\projects.
$Encoded = ($RepoRoot -replace '[\\:/]', '-')
$SessionDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".claude\projects\$Encoded"

# Fallback 1: legacy hard-coded encoding from the original template (kept for
# back-compat with anyone whose clone was already wired up to D:\projects\csc291).
if (-not (Test-Path $SessionDir)) {
    $Fallback = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".claude\projects\D--projects-csc291"
    if (Test-Path $Fallback) { $SessionDir = $Fallback }
}

# Fallback 2: if neither path exists, glob the newest folder under
# .claude\projects\ whose name contains this repo's leaf directory. Handy for
# renamed clones (e.g. CSC291-DroneAid-belle-fork).
if (-not (Test-Path $SessionDir)) {
    $RepoLeaf = Split-Path $RepoRoot -Leaf
    $Candidate = Get-ChildItem -Path (Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".claude\projects") -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue `
        | Where-Object { $_.Name -like "*$RepoLeaf*" } `
        | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending `
        | Select-Object -First 1
    if ($Candidate) { $SessionDir = $Candidate.FullName }
}

if (-not (Test-Path $SessionDir)) {
    Write-Host "No Claude Code session dir found for this clone."
    Write-Host "Looked under $env:USERPROFILE\.claude\projects\ for an encoded path matching $Encoded."
    exit 0
}

# Newest *.jsonl in that directory.
$Latest = Get-ChildItem -Path $SessionDir -Filter *.jsonl -File `
    | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending `
    | Select-Object -First 1

if (-not $Latest) {
    Write-Host "No .jsonl session files found in $SessionDir."
    exit 0
}

# Resolve python (prefer py launcher on Windows).
$Py = (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
if (-not $Py) { $Py = (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) }
if (-not $Py) {
    Write-Error "Python not found. Install Python 3.13 (or higher) and re-run."
    exit 1
}

# Target path under docs/agent-logs.
$Date = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd"
$TargetDir = Join-Path $RepoRoot "docs\agent-logs\$Handle"
$TargetFile = Join-Path $TargetDir "$Date`_$($Latest.BaseName).jsonl"

content.text:
# Login to GitHub via gh CLI

**Step 1.** Open new terminal in repo dir (PowerShell or Git Bash).

**Step 2.** Run:
```powershell
& "C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe" auth login
```

Or if you added `C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\` to PATH (winget usually does, may need shell restart):
```powershell
gh auth login
```

**Step 3.** Pick options (use arrow keys + Enter):

| Prompt | Pick |
|---|---|
| What account... | `GitHub.com` |
| What is your preferred protocol... | `HTTPS` |
| Authenticate Git with your GitHub credentials? | `Yes` |
| How would you like to authenticate GitHub CLI? | `Login with a web browser` |

**Step 4.** gh prints:
```
! First copy your one-time code: XXXX-XXXX
Press Enter to open github.com in your browser...
```

Press Enter ??? browser opens `github.com/login/device` ??? paste code ??? approve scopes (`repo`, `read:org`, `gist`, `workflow`).

**Step 5.** Terminal shows:
```
??? Authentication complete.
??? Logged in as Tantawan7
```

**Step 6.** Tell me "done" ??? I'll run `gh pr create` for both branches.

---

**Alternate (single line, no menus):**
```powershell
& "C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe" auth login --web --git-protocol https --hostname github.com
```
Skips first two menu prompts. Still needs device-code flow.

detail per spec. Save calls setWeather; disabled when draft == current
to prevent no-op writes. Storm draft surfaces the abort-risk warning
banner per AC.

Uses the new RadioGroup ancestor pattern ??? RadioListTile's groupValue
+ onChanged are deprecated as of Flutter 3.32.

Out of scope: human-readable name for updatedBy (shows raw uid). Profile
join is more than this page is worth; deferrable until the admin shell
has a shared user-name lookup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <[REDACTED:email]>
EOF
)" && git log --oneline -2
